documents.label: A copy of the minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: Listed under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative' — any one of these is sufficient.

parentId.notes: Listed under 'For proof of your identity' with 'provide one from each category' — any one of these three is sufficient.

address.notes: The form does not list a separate proof-of-address document category. The guardian's current address is collected on the form itself.

childId.notes: The form explicitly states 'For the minor, please provide BOTH of the following' — both the minor's Social Security card and birth certificate are required.

documents.label: Proof of guardianship (if not named on child's birth certificate)
Driver's license or another government issued identification card (e.g. state ID card)
Proof of address (bank statement, utility bill, or insurance statement)

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate establishes parentage/authority if the parent is named on it. If the parent is not named on the birth certificate, proof of guardianship (court order) is required instead. These are mutually exclusive alternatives depending on the situation.

childId.notes: The page explicitly lists both 'a copy of your child's birth certificate' AND 'a copy of your child's Social Security card' as required items with no indication that one can substitute for the other. Both are required.

mailingAddress.notes: The page lists two addresses: standard mail (PO Box 9554) and overnight mail (701 Experian Parkway). The standard mail address is the correct one for mailed requests. This page covers checking for a minor's credit report, not explicitly a protected consumer freeze, but it is the relevant minor/child request page for Experian.

authority.notes: Page content was blocked by Cloudflare security verification — no requirements could be extracted.

mailingAddress.notes: Both the main page and the address-source page (https://www.transunion.com/credit-freeze/mail-or-phone) were blocked by Cloudflare security services. No mailing address could be extracted.
